overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban plaza at dusk, transitioning from an open waterfront area with reflective pools into a covered pedestrian underpass lined with graffiti and neon signage. The environment features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and wet pavement reflecting the neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with reflective water pools

events.description: camera rises from water reflection to reveal plaza level and surrounding buildings
character begins walking forward through the plaza

agents.ego_description: character walks through the plaza, passing by illuminated water features and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: large shallow pool with mirror-like surface reflecting the surrounding neon lights
tall building with illuminated windows and holographic advertisements
large orange support beams of the underpass structure visible in the distance
bright pink and blue neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a low-angle view of water reflections before rising to reveal a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The character walks through the open space, passing reflective water pools that mirror the neon-lit glass towers surrounding the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with holographic advertisements and palm trees

events.description: character turns slightly right while continuing forward toward the underpass
approaching the entrance to a covered pedestrian underpass with orange structural elements

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate crowds in the open plaza toward the underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and shorts walking past the camera
group of pedestrians walking along the plaza edge near palm trees

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisement displaying animated content
tall palm trees silhouetted against the blue hour sky
dark opening of the pedestrian underpass with orange framing

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the bustling plaza, passing holographic billboards and palm trees while approaching a large underpass entrance. The crowd density increases as pedestrians move in various directions across the open concrete plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance transitioning to underpass

events.description: entering the underpass, lighting shifts from mixed natural to artificial sources
fully entering the covered underpass with graffiti-covered walls visible

agents.ego_description: character walks into the underpass entrance, passing under large orange structural beams

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow tank top walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
illuminated vending machines with neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered underpass, transitioning from the open plaza to a sheltered walkway. The lighting shifts to artificial sources as graffiti-covered walls and vending machines become visible along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground pedestrian corridor with graffiti art and seating areas

events.description: passing by seated individuals against graffiti-covered walls, smoke visible

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the underpass corridor, passing people sitting on concrete benches and smoking

notable_agents.action: two women sitting on a bench, one smoking a cigarette
pedestrian in yellow tank top continuing forward through the corridor

entered.detail: simple concrete seating along the graffiti-covered wall
large colorful mural of a horse head with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the underpass, the character walks past concrete benches where people sit and smoke against walls covered in detailed graffiti art. The corridor is lit by artificial lighting and neon vending machines, creating an enclosed urban atmosphere distinct from the open plaza above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, reflective urban plaza at dusk into a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian underpass. It begins with a low-angle view of water reflections before rising to follow a character walking past reflective pools and towering glass skyscrapers. As the character moves deeper into the bustling plaza, the open space fills with holographic billboards and palm trees, leading the camera toward a large concrete entrance. The scene then shifts from the open air into a covered walkway, where the natural dusk light is replaced by artificial glows, graffiti-covered walls, and vending machines. Finally, the camera pushes further into the enclosed corridor, passing concrete benches and smoking pedestrians amidst a dense atmosphere of urban street art and neon signage.
